items.name: 🐭 Pink Plush Mouse Backpack 🐭
items.description: Squeak into style! 🌸✨ This adorable pink mouse backpack is the ultimate kawaii accessory for your avatar. With big shiny eyes, soft pastel vibes, and a playful design, it’s perfect for school looks, cozy outfits, or just showing off your cuteness overload! 🎒💕
